description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly blue in color, with a rectangular base and a slightly angled upper section housing a display screen. The front features a control panel with two red joysticks and several blue and red buttons, designed for two-player gameplay. The screen displays a pixelated 'Space Invaders' game scene, framed by a green border. The lower front panel includes a coin slot mechanism and a small access door, typical of coin-operated arcade machines. The right side panel is decorated with vibrant 'Space Invaders' artwork, featuring a large black alien figure, yellow and red accents, and the game's title in bold yellow letters. The back and left side of the cabinet are plain blue, with no additional graphics or features.
description: A blue upright 'Space Invaders' arcade game cabinet with a control panel, coin slot, and colorful side artwork. The front features joysticks, buttons, and a classic game screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with two joysticks, multiple buttons, the game screen, coin slot, and a small access door.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the control panel layout, with no visible artwork or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain blue back panel with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the vibrant 'Space Invaders' artwork and the control panel's arrangement.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with a visible bezel, medium size typical of vintage arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and four round buttons (two blue, two red) arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with controls spaced evenly across a blue panel.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Right side features colorful 'Space Invaders' artwork with a large black alien, yellow and red accents, and the game's title; left side is plain blue.
